_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing comprehensive AI test plans covering functional performance, fairness, robustness, safety, and operational requirements, with defined pass/fail criteria for each dimension.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.547), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.614). Shared vocabulary: [plans, skill, test]. DCWF-only terms [writing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, comprehensive, covering, criteria, defined, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.938, R=0.826). P exceeds R by 0.112 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in writing test plans." and "Skill in designing comprehensive AI test plans covering functional performance," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 < STS 0.614 (gap -0.051). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [writing] and [ai, comprehensive, covering] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [plans, skill, test]. DCWF-only: [writing]. WIDAI-only: [ai, comprehensive, covering, criteria, defined, designing].
